checks.label: Public HTTPS app URL
checks.action: Set VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL to the deployed HTTPS app URL.

checks.label: Public profile target
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID to a synced Supabase profile id.

checks.label: Public prediction proof target
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID to a synced prediction capsule id with a share manifest.

checks.label: Public mode proof target
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS to synced mode proof run ids with share manifests.

checks.label: Public profile render
checks.detail: rendered 1/1 profile page with canonical URL, social metadata and JSON-LD
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID to a synced Supabase profile id.

checks.label: Public prediction proof render
checks.detail: rendered 1/1 proof page with canonical URL, social metadata and JSON-LD
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID to a synced prediction capsule id with a share manifest.

checks.label: Public mode proof render
checks.detail: rendered 4/4 mode pages with canonical URL, social metadata and JSON-LD
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS to synced mode proof run ids with share manifests.

checks.label: Clean-session account restore
checks.detail: clean-session cloud restore missing profile (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); proof (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); mode (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered)
checks.action: Render profile, proof and every mode proof page from the deployed app with cloud-loaded Supabase content in a clean browser context.

checks.label: Public share image read
checks.action: Generate a record share card PNG, upload it to Supabase Storage and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL.

checks.label: Public mode share image read
checks.action: Generate a mode proof share card PNG, upload it to Supabase Storage and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL.
